title: Extract simulator state nested factories
description: Refactor buildSimulatorState so route, fixture, trigger, and lookup helpers are defined as top-level factory functions instead of nested function declarations while preserving simulator behavior.
acceptance_criteria: No function declarations remain nested inside buildSimulatorState; targeted simulator tests and npm test pass.
close_reason: Completed: buildSimulatorState no longer defines nested functions; simulator behavior validated by targeted Jest suite and source inspection. Full npm test/lint blockers are pre-existing environment/repo warnings documented in comments.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Loop contract: Hypothesis: extracting the nested helpers from buildSimulatorState into top-level factory functions that receive explicit dependencies will remove nested function declarations without changing simulator behavior. Acceptance evidence: source inspection shows buildSimulatorState contains no nested function declarations; npm test passes; npm run lint passes if feasible. Owner: Codex.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Evidence update: FAIL npm test from /workspace/dadeto and /home/matt/dadeto both fail only on pre-existing hard-coded path expectation in test/local/notionCodex.config.test.js (Expected /home/matt/dadeto/... Received /workspace/dadeto/...). Targeted simulator suite passes with node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/.bin/jest --watchman=false --runTestsByPath test/local/gcp-simulator.test.js. Source inspection command with acorn reports: No nested functions in buildSimulatorState. npm run lint fails on existing warnings in unrelated files src/core/cloud/render-variant/render-variant-core.js and src/core/local/gcp-simulator/fake-firestore.js; targeted npx eslint src/core/local/gcp-simulator/simulator.js --max-warnings=0 --no-color passes.
